name: Sichuan Beef Bundles
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Red New Mex chile, crushed
1 tbsp Rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chile, soy sauce, hot bean sauce, ginger, sugar, and rice wine in a bowl. Marinate the meat for four hours.
2. Cook the vegetables (carrots, celery, green beans) in boiling salted water until tender but still slightly crispy. Drain.
3. Wrap each vegetable bundle with a piece of marinated beef.
4. Thread the meat bundles onto parallel skewers.
5. Grill the meat bundles until medium rare, about 3 to 4 minutes on each side.
6. Brush the meat with the sauce and garnish with sesame seeds before serving.
